reviews.review_description: There is some great photogrammatric content on GO that has this 'stitched' together feel that I assume helps performance, but it all still looks great.
Amazing project! It feels like you are really there flying above the narrows!
Makes you want to visit the real thing, great use of VR
This is very well done. The controls are easy to learn. This is a cool experience. It would be cool to be able to see more of the national park though.
Wow! I feel like an eagle flying 1000 feet above the ground! Amazing!
By Specterras. Virtual tour of mountain attraction. TRT 10 min.

reviews.review_title: G'Day Mark here from the Blue Mountians
reviews.review_description:
I just wanted to say hello first and ask how are you both? And I really hope you are enjoying your stay in our beautiful country.

I downloaded the app and have bounced all over the place inside the canyon it was indeed alot of fun, I also liked the information that is given at veriouse hubs. 
there has definitely been alot of effort gone into this and you have a long path ahead I look forward to trying out the VR in the visitor's centre. I also liked seeing those little clips of video at diffrent hubs. there is still work to be done and things to be touched up but I know you guys are onto it.
I hope to see you guys again in the future on your next visit. give me a buzz if your in the area and if you got time be good to have a chat. 
Stay safe have fun.
Cheers from your Aussie buddy Mark.
Presentation shows what's possible in VR.

Keep up the great work guys. You've got a long way to go before this is ready for publishing. Certainly can't move around like you say that you can. I have a gear VR controller. But all you can do is look at the green spots and move towards it. Yeah all the polygons are hastily put together. The bitmaps wrapping the bygones are a bit to basic with the trees. Very glitchy.

reviews.review_title: Cool experince with some good views.
reviews.review_description: Was fun and educational can be a little hard to navigate to new spots and not ones you’ve already been to but the views were really cool. All in all good for a free experience.
The photography is great. A bit short though.
Way to short. Can only move like a dozen times. Teaser big time. Nice try though.

I’m giving you a 2 star bc it’s so amazing and wonderful till you get to one of the green dots and a loud “JesusChrist” is yelled. It almost sounds like a cartoon clip with foul language was slipped in to the game. Please fix this. It doesn’t last long but my 8 year old cane in crying because she thought it was the people drowning that they speak about in the game! Not cool !
